title: Web Proxies
html:
Web Proxies

Burp Shortcuts

CommandDescription
 
**Shortcut**
**Description**
[`CTRL+R`]
Send to repeater
[`CTRL+SHIFT+R`]
Go to repeater
[`CTRL+I`]
Send to intruder
[`CTRL+SHIFT+I`]
Go to intruder
[`CTRL+U`]
URL encode
[`CTRL+SHIFT+U`]
URL decode

ZAP Shortcuts

CommandDescription
 
**Shortcut**
**Description**
[`CTRL+B`]
Toggle intercept on/off
[`CTRL+R`]
Go to replacer
[`CTRL+E`]
Go to encode/decode/hash

**Shortcut**
**Description**
[`CTRL+SHIFT+R`]
Force Refresh Page
